Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Defendants SOUCEHOV HOLDINGS, INC. and RUST CONSULTING, INC.'S Motion for Protective Order is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: BARRI BONAPART, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

App To Seal Unredacted Copies Of Exhibits To Declarations
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maria Ellinikos, Esq. of Akin Gump Strauss Hauer & Feld, Tel. 415.765.9500, for defendants and moving party.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling, which was not contested. DEFENDANTs SOUCEHOV HOLDINGS, INC. and RUST CONSULTING, INC.'s Application To Seal Unredacted Copies Of Exhibits To Declarations is granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. (Moving party to prepare a proposed order that complies with CRC 2.550-2.551.) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
(Signed order will not be filed for failure to comply with CRC 2.550-2.551.)

Mtn To Dismiss Or Stay First Amended Complt
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maria Ellinikos, Esq. of Akin Gump Strauss Hauer & Feld, Tel. 415.765.9500, for defendants and moving party;
Robin G. Workman, Esq. of Qualls & Workman, Tel. 415.782.3660, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court takes DEFENDANTs SOUCEHOV HOLDINGS, INC. and RUST CONSULTING, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Or Stay First Amended Complaint under submission. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
